qa_pairs.question: For optimal efficiency, what is the recommended minimum number of cells per core for Fluent simulations on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: For optimal efficiency in Fluent simulations on Alliance clusters, you should ensure there are at least 10,000 cells per core.

qa_pairs.question: If Fluent encounters crashes during the initial automatic mesh partitioning phase when using standard Intel-based scripts on Narval clusters, what alternative approaches are available?
qa_pairs.answer: If Fluent crashes during the initial automatic mesh partitioning phase with standard Intel-based scripts on Narval clusters, you can utilize the OpenMPI-based scripts provided in the Narval tabs for a more robust solution. Alternatively, you can manually perform the mesh partitioning within the Fluent graphical user interface (GUI) to inspect partition statistics and specify an optimal partitioning method, then rerun the job with the Intel-based scripts.
